collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (6 total Queries, 6 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `prefixes`.`prefixe`, `prefixes`.`est_autre_operateur`, COALESCE(SUM(transactions.frais), 0) as total_frais, COALESCE(SUM(transactions.montant), 0) as total_montant FROM `transactions` LEFT JOIN `comptes` as `compte_destination` ON `compte_destination`.`id` = `transactions`.`id_compte_destination` LEFT JOIN `clients` as `client_destination` ON `client_destination`.`id` = `compte_destination`.`id_client` LEFT JOIN `prefixes` ON `prefixes`.`id` = `client_destination`.`id_prefixe` WHERE `transactions`.`id_type_operation` = 3 GROUP BY `prefixes`.`id`, `prefixes`.`prefixe`, `prefixes`.`est_autre_operateur` ORDER BY `prefixes`.`prefixe` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `prefixes`.`prefixe`, `prefixes`.`est_autre_operateur`, COALESCE(SUM(transactions.frais), 0) as total_frais, COALESCE(SUM(transactions.montant), 0) as total_montant FROM `transactions` LEFT JOIN `comptes` as `compte_destination` ON `compte_destination`.`id` = `transactions`.`id_compte_destination` LEFT JOIN `clients` as `client_destination` ON `client_destination`.`id` = `compte_destination`.`id_client` LEFT JOIN `prefixes` ON `prefixes`.`id` = `client_destination`.`id_prefixe` WHERE `transactions`.`id_type_operation` = 3 GROUP BY `prefixes`.`id`, `prefixes`.`prefixe`, `prefixes`.`est_autre_operateur` ORDER BY `prefixes`.`prefixe` ASC
